name: map_finite_external_body_trusted
reason: `map_finite` is `external_body` with `unimplemented!()` — the finiteness preservation of `Set::map` is trusted without proof, creating an unnecessary soundness dependency

name: map_empty_is_empty
reason: Mapping an empty set should produce an empty set — if it didn't, the map operation would fabricate elements from nothing

name: map_finite_auto_instantiation
reason: The auto lemma should allow chaining map operations while preserving finiteness — if it fails for composed maps, the auto quantifier doesn't propagate correctly

name: map_singleton_is_singleton
reason: Mapping a singleton set should produce a singleton with the mapped element — any other result means Set::map mishandles the simplest non-empty case
